_comment: Machine-readable registry of every data source and redistributable dataset Golavo carries, plans, or has rejected. It is the single source of truth for attribution, license classification, and CI provenance gates. scripts/validate_sources.py cross-checks it against packs/snapshots.json and every pack manifest; scripts/gen_third_party_notices.py renders THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md from it. Contributor names are derived ONLY from an upstream LICENSE/CITATION/repository owner or a cited paper's author list, never invented. Verified dates record a live primary-source check; recheck_by marks blocked/rejected entries to revisit.

license_classes.core: CC0-1.0 / public-domain data folded into the bundled index; joins freely within the class.
license_classes.enrichment: CC-BY-4.0 factual enrichment (coords, timezones); may join core read-only for display, attribution enforced.
license_classes.odbl-pack: ODbL-1.0 share-alike data; physically isolated user-data pack, never joined to core or another class.
license_classes.by-sa-pack: CC-BY-SA-4.0 share-alike data; physically isolated pack, never joined to core, ODbL, or another class.
license_classes.research-pack: CC-BY-4.0 (or MIT) historical event/tracking data; per-match artifacts only, raw tables never join the index.
license_classes.dev-only: OSI-licensed software used only in dev/CI; never shipped in a runtime dependency set.
license_classes.rejected: Terms verified incompatible with free/open redistribution; recorded so CI can forbid its use.
license_classes.blocked: Would be usable but a live blocker (license contradiction, gated host, missing LICENSE) prevents adoption; recheck_by set.

sources.name: martj42/international_results
sources.fields: men's senior international results 1872-present, date-only (00:00 UTC kickoff proxy), goalscorers, shootouts, former-name aliases
sources.attribution: International football results from martj42/international_results (Mart Jürisoo), CC0-1.0.
sources.notes: Bundled and seal-eligible. Sole forward-seal training source. Date-only; exact kickoff requires the worldcup-json overlay.

sources.name: openfootball/football.json
sources.fields: top-five European league results, completed historical seasons through 2025-26 (no 2026-27 published as of verified date)
sources.attribution: Club football results from openfootball/football.json (Gerald Bauer and contributors), CC0-1.0.
sources.notes: Bundled, search/backtest only (five leagues share one source_id, so not seal-eligible). Naive local kickoff time; club rows carry kickoff_precision=day.

sources.name: openfootball/worldcup.json
sources.fields: World Cup fixtures/results with exact kickoff time + UTC offset, round, venue city, stadium timezone/coords (separate stadiums file); knockout placeholders W###/L### before teams resolve
sources.attribution: World Cup fixtures and kickoff times from openfootball/worldcup.json (Gerald Bauer and contributors), CC0-1.0.
sources.notes: Bundled as a fixture/kickoff co-source inside the refreshed internationals pack: supplies the World Cup fixtures martj42 has not published yet plus exact kickoff times. Excluded from model training (martj42 remains the sole training source). A user-authorized post-match check may also use its pinned, hashed final score to settle a World Cup seal when martj42 still reports NA/NA; if both sources publish and disagree, settlement fails closed. W###/L### placeholder fixtures are rejected until the bracket resolves.

sources.name: openfootball/champions-league
sources.fields: UEFA Champions League (including qualifiers), Europa League, and Conference League fixtures/results in Football.TXT format
sources.attribution: European club competition data from openfootball/champions-league (Gerald Bauer and contributors), CC0-1.0.
sources.notes: Registered for Phase 2, not bundled yet. Every imported competition-season must pass fixture/result completeness and format-era checks before Golavo marks it available.

sources.name: openfootball/euro
sources.fields: UEFA European Championship fixtures/results in Football.TXT format
sources.attribution: European Championship data from openfootball/euro (Gerald Bauer and contributors), CC0-1.0.
sources.notes: Registered for Phase 2, not bundled yet. Used only after edition completeness and rule-version validation; martj42 remains the historical international results source.

sources.name: GeoNames
sources.fields: city coordinates, country, timezone, altitude — bulk dumps (cities15000, countryInfo, timeZones)
sources.attribution: Geographic data from GeoNames (geonames.org), licensed CC BY 4.0.
sources.notes: Planned enrichment source. Bulk dumps only, no runtime web-service dependency. Commercial use permitted with attribution.

sources.name: Natural Earth
sources.fields: simplified public-domain vector coastlines and country boundaries for offline travel maps
sources.notes: Registered for Phase 3, not bundled yet. Golavo will pin one simplified release and hash; no online tile service or third-party basemap is required.

sources.name: Wikidata
sources.fields: structured data only — stable entity ids, multilingual aliases, country/confederation, venue metadata
sources.attribution: Structured data from Wikidata (CC0); we credit it voluntarily as 'Data from Wikidata'.
sources.notes: Later-if-needed. Structured data is CC0; prose (CC BY-SA) and Commons media (per-file) are excluded. Never auto-merge identities from a similarity match.

sources.name: OpenLigaDB
sources.fields: Bundesliga 1/2/3 + DFB-Pokal + World Cup fixtures/results with true matchDateTimeUTC; community-entered
sources.attribution: Datenquelle: OpenLigaDB (www.openligadb.de) — Open Database License (ODbL) v1.0.
sources.notes: Optional isolated ODbL pack. A redistributed derivative database must itself be ODbL and ship the license URI; must never merge into the CC0/CC-BY core or the CC-BY-SA pack. Single-operator hobby service — feature must tolerate its permanent absence.

sources.name: Fjelstul World Cup Database
sources.fields: men's (1930-2022) + women's (1991-2019) World Cup history: matches, players, managers, referees, stadiums, events, awards
sources.attribution: Fjelstul World Cup Database v1.2.0 © 2023 Joshua C. Fjelstul, Ph.D., CC BY-SA 4.0; modifications noted.
sources.notes: Vendored as an isolated facts-only CC-BY-SA pack. Grant lives only in README+DESCRIPTION (no LICENSE file), no v1.2.0 tag — pinned at commit f942c6b with README+DESCRIPTION retained as license evidence. NEVER substitute WorldCups.ai downloads (CC BY-NC-SA). Golavo uses only the men's 1930–2022 history.

sources.name: Pappalardo/Wyscout public soccer event dataset
sources.fields: 1,941 historical matches, 3,251,294 events, and 4,299 players (2017/18 big-five leagues + WC2018 + Euro2016): events, matches, players, teams, referees
sources.attribution: Event data: Pappalardo et al., Sci Data 6:236 (2019), CC BY 4.0 (collected by Wyscout).
sources.notes: Optional research pack. Historical team-level research only; never blended into live models or simulations. Labeled by exact competition and era, never 'observed xG'. Raw events are optional; compact derived artifacts may be bundled with attribution and modification notices.

sources.name: SkillCorner Open Data
sources.fields: 10 A-League 2024/25 matches: broadcast tracking (10fps, extrapolated), dynamic events, phases of play, season aggregates
sources.attribution: Tracking data courtesy of SkillCorner and PySport (SkillCorner Open Data, MIT).
sources.notes: Optional research pack. Preserve documented limits (~97% ID accuracy; extrapolated frames flagged).

sources.name: IDSSE — integrated spatiotemporal + event data
sources.fields: 7 elite German matches (~2.63 GB): synchronized TRACAB tracking + DFL event data (XML)
sources.attribution: IDSSE dataset, provided with authorization of the Deutsche Fußball Liga (DFL); Bassek et al., Sci Data 12:195 (2025), CC BY 4.0.
sources.notes: Research-only (pipeline validation). 2.63 GB for 7 matches — not a user-facing pack. Attribution must name DFL and cite the paper.

sources.name: Meteostat
sources.fields: historical observed weather (temperature, precipitation, wind); bulk annual Parquet
sources.notes: BLOCKED: /license states CC BY 4.0 but the live /faq states CC BY-NC 4.0 — a contradiction that must be resolved in writing before adoption. Also no historical-FORECAST archive exists, so weather can only ever be context, never a backtested pre-match feature.

sources.name: martj42/womens-international-results
sources.notes: BLOCKED: no LICENSE file as of the verified date (default all-rights-reserved). Do not use or redistribute. Recheck for an added open license.

sources.name: Open-Meteo (hosted free API)
sources.notes: REJECTED as a default dependency: the hosted free API tier is non-commercial only. Only ever a user-supplied optional adapter with disclosed terms.

sources.name: StatsBomb Open Data
sources.notes: REJECTED: user agreement forbids redistribution and commercial use, is revocable, and mandates logo attribution. Not an open-data license.

sources.name: ClubElo
sources.notes: REJECTED: publishes no license or terms of any kind. Free access is not a redistribution grant.

sources.name: football-data.org
sources.notes: REJECTED: proprietary API service with a post-cancellation data restriction. Free access is not openly licensed redistributable data.
